surface_verification.justification: Version-metadata + documentation/branding edits only; no user-experienceable surface (web/cli/api) and no functional code touched. Verified via ruff lint, sync_check version parity, the plugin-cache-sync + artifact-path-canon suites, and the F0 isolation leak-guard. Full monorepo suite runs as the authoritative gate on the PR (watched to green before merge).

behaviors.behavior: All plugin manifest + marketplace versions are mutually consistent at 0.29.0 (one number everywhere)
behaviors.evidence: shared/scripts/sync_check.py -> [ OK ] Versions (all 13 plugins in sync); shared/tests/test_plugin_cache_sync.py PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Public docs (README badge+banner, SECURITY, CONTRIBUTING) carry a consistent 'Beta' label and introduce no dead/legacy artifact paths
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_artifact_path_canon.py PASSED; git grep 'Early Access' confirms only out-of-scope CI comment + internal migration note remain

behaviors.behavior: docs/guide.md no longer links to the gitignored Spec/external-frameworks-integration.md (no permanent dead links once public)
behaviors.evidence: git grep 'Spec/' docs/guide.md returns empty after edit
